chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 818 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.3171/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.3172/2024 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 26-09-2025 None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received; same was the position on the last date of hearing. The instant Constitutional Petition is pending on the file of this Court since, 2024 without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional petition along with listed applications is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
